package.name: navigation
package.description:
Minimal point-to-point navigator for the G1 Onboard.
Per the 2026-05-14 spec change, the demo environment is fixed and obstacle-free, so the full Nav2 stack (map_server / amcl / planner_server / controller_server / bt_navigator) was removed. This package now ships a single goto_node that: - subscribes to the UWB absolute pose from sensors/uwb_node, - accepts a named goal key (std_msgs/String) on /onboard/cmd/nav_goal and looks it up in named_goals.yaml -> (x, y, theta) in the UWB 'map' frame (2026-05-16: reverted decision 5a -- NX owns the lookup again for debugging convenience), - emits cmd_vel toward the target (P-controller) until within tolerance, - reports nav state on /onboard/nav/state (g1_onboard_msgs/NavState).
The cmd_vel still flows through safety_monitor before reaching motor_controller.
